case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. ALMETA PERRY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY, ALMETA INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA TWO JACKS SEAFOOD AKA TWO JACKS FISH MARKET PERRY, STEPHEN INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA TWO JACKS SEAFOOD AKA TWO JACKS FISH MARKET $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, ALMETA INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA TWO JACKS SEAFOOD AKA TWO JACKS FISH MARKET PERRY, STEPHEN INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY, DBA TWO JACKS SEAFOOD AKA TWO JACKS FISH MARKET JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
